repo.json.name: Dan's Workshop
repo.json.subtitle: All my mods in one place
repo.json.description:
Welcome to the official AltStore repository of Dan's Workshop!

Here, you can explore and download all of my free tweaked apps.

news.title: From version 5.2, YTPlus requires a subscription
news.caption:
Starting from version 5.2, YTPlus requires a Patreon subscription (activation in YTPlus settings).

This subscription applies strictly to YTPlus tweak features only and is not affiliated with YouTube or any other tweaks.

The last free version is 5.2b4.
